```{r}
    labels = c(
      "BBS/HC",
      "BBS/IS",
      expression(italic("M. aurum") * "/HC"),
      expression(italic("M. aurum") * "/IS")
    ),
    drop = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_smooth(
    aes(group = 1),
    method = "lm",
    se = FALSE,
    color = "black",
    linewidth = 1,
    linetype = "solid",
    alpha = 0.8
  ) +
  stat_cor(
    aes(group = 1),
    method = "pearson",
    label.x = Inf,
    label.y = Inf,
    hjust = 1.1,
    vjust = 1.5,
    size = 5,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 18, color = "black"),
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.8),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.title = element_text(size = 18, hjust = 0.5)
  ) +
  xlab(expression(atop("Relative hippocampal " * italic(Cd169) * " mRNA Expression"))) +
  ylab(expression(atop("Time Exploring Juvenile", "% of BBS/HC control")))

# Dummy legend data
legend_df <- data.frame(
  x = 1:4,
  y = 1:4,
  Group = factor(all_groups, levels = all_groups)
)

# Dummy legend plot
legend_plot <- ggplot(legend_df, aes(x = x, y = y, color = Group)) +
  geom_point(size = 4) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Group",
    values = stoodis_colors,
    breaks = all_groups,
    labels = c(
      "BBS/HC",
      "BBS/IS",
      expression(italic("M. aurum") * "/HC"),
      expression(italic("M. aurum") * "/IS")
    ),
    drop = FALSE
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    legend.title = element_text(size = 20),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 18),
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.key.height = unit(0.8, "cm"),
    legend.key.width = unit(1, "cm")
  )

shared_legend <- cowplot::get_legend(legend_plot)

# Arrange panels
panel_plots <- ggarrange(
  Cd169_JSE_condition_plot,
  Cd169_JSE_treatment_plot,
  ncol = 2,
  nrow = 1,
  labels = c("A", "B"),
  widths = c(1, 1),
  font.label = list(size = 50, face = "bold")
)

# Combine panels + legend
Cd169_JSE_plots <- ggarrange(
  panel_plots,
  shared_legend,
  ncol = 2,
  widths = c(1, 0.22)
)

Cd169_JSE_plots

# Save JPEG
ggsave(
  filename = "Maurum_data/R_figures/maurum_Cd169_JSE_plots.jpeg",
  plot = Cd169_JSE_plots,
  device = "jpeg",
  dpi = 600,
  width = 20,
  height = 10
)

# Save SVG
ggsave(
  filename = "Maurum_Data/R_figures/maurum_Cd169_JSE_plots.svg",
  plot = Cd169_JSE_plots,
  device = svglite::svglite,
  units = "in",
  width = 20,
  height = 10
)
```
## Figures and Saving Files- CP Il6 vs. JSE Condition and Treatment 
```{r}
# R-squared for Il6 vs. JSE condition for linear regression model
r2_Il6c_cp <- summary(Il6_cp_model)$r.squared
# p-value for Cd169 vs. JSE condition for linear regressions model 
pval_Il6c_cp <- summary(Il6_cp_model)$coefficients[2, 4]
# slope for Cd169 vs. JSE condition
slope_Il6c_cp <- summary(Il6_cp_model)$coefficients[2, 1]

# R-squared for Il6 vs. JSE treatment 
r2_Il6t_cp <- summary(Il6_cp_model2)$r.squared
# p-value for Cd169 vs. JSE treatment
pval_Il6t_cp <- summary(Il6_cp_model2)$coefficients[2, 4]
# slope for Cd169 vs. JSE treatment
slope_Il6t_cp <- summary(Il6_cp_model2)$coefficients[2, 1]


cat("Condition model:\n")
cat("R² =", round(r2_Il6c_cp, 3), "\n") 
cat("p-value =", signif(pval_Il6c_cp, 3), "\n")
cat("slope =", round(slope_Il6c_cp, 3), "\n")

cat("Treatment model:\n")
cat("R² =", round(r2_Il6t_cp, 3), "\n") 
cat("p-value =", signif(pval_Il6t_cp, 3), "\n")
cat("slope =", round(slope_Il6t_cp, 3), "\n")

# Shared factor levels
all_groups <- c("BBS/HC", "BBS/IS", "M. aurum/HC", "M. aurum/IS")

# Colors
stoodis_colors <- c(
  "BBS/HC" = "#B3E1F0",
  "BBS/IS" = "#148CBA",
  "M. aurum/HC" = "#98E0B1",
  "M. aurum/IS" = "#21A951"
)

# Prepare condition data
Il6_JSE_cp_condition <- Il6_JSE_cp_condition %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Group = factor(group, levels = all_groups),
    mRNA = as.numeric(mRNA),
    JSE = as.numeric(JSE)
  )

# Prepare treatment data
Il6_JSE_cp_treatment <- Il6_JSE_cp_treatment %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Group = factor(group, levels = all_groups),
    mRNA = as.numeric(mRNA),
    JSE = as.numeric(JSE)
  )

# Panel A
Il6_JSE_cp_condition_plot <- ggplot(Il6_JSE_cp_condition, aes(x = mRNA, y = JSE, color = Group)) +
  geom_point(
    size = 3,
    alpha = 0.9
  ) +
   scale_color_manual(
    name = "Group",
    values = stoodis_colors,
    breaks = all_groups,
    labels = c(
      "BBS/HC",
      "BBS/IS",
      expression(italic("M. aurum") * "/HC"),
      expression(italic("M. aurum") * "/IS")
    ),
    drop = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_smooth(
    aes(group = 1),
    method = "lm",
    se = FALSE,
    color = "black",
    linewidth = 1,
    linetype = "solid"
  ) +
  stat_cor(
    aes(group = 1),
    method = "pearson",
    label.x = max(Il6_JSE_cp_condition$mRNA, na.rm = TRUE),
    label.y = max(Il6_JSE_cp_condition$JSE, na.rm = TRUE),
    size = 5,
    hjust = 1,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 18, color = "black"),
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.8),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.title = element_text(size = 18, hjust = 0.5)
  ) +
     xlab(expression(atop("Relative choroid plexus " * italic(Il6) * " mRNA Expression"))) +
  ylab(expression(atop("Time Exploring Juvenile", "% of BBS/HC control")))

# Panel B
Il6_JSE_cp_treatment_plot <- ggplot(Il6_JSE_cp_treatment, aes(x = mRNA, y = JSE, color = Group)) +
  geom_point(
    size = 3,
    alpha = 0.9
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Group",
    values = stoodis_colors,
    breaks = all_groups,
    labels = c(
      "BBS/HC",
      "BBS/IS",
      expression(italic("M. aurum") * "/HC"),
      expression(italic("M. aurum") * "/IS")
    ),
    drop = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_smooth(
    aes(group = 1),
    method = "lm",
    se = FALSE,
    color = "black",
    linewidth = 1,
    linetype = "solid"
  ) +
  stat_cor(
    aes(group = 1),
    method = "pearson",
    label.x = max(Il6_JSE_cp_treatment$mRNA, na.rm = TRUE),
    label.y = max(Il6_JSE_cp_treatment$JSE, na.rm = TRUE),
    size = 5,
    hjust = 1,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 18, color = "black"),
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.8),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.title = element_text(size = 18, hjust = 0.5)
  ) +
     xlab(expression(atop("Relative choroid plexus " * italic(Il6) * " mRNA Expression"))) +
  ylab(expression(atop("Time Exploring Juvenile", "% of BBS/HC control")))


# Arrange the two Il6 panels first
Il6_cp_panel_plots <- ggarrange(
  Il6_JSE_cp_condition_plot,
  Il6_JSE_cp_treatment_plot,
  ncol = 2,
  nrow = 1,
  labels = c("A", "B"),
  widths = c(1, 1),
  font.label = list(size = 50, face = "bold")
)

# Dummy legend data
legend_Il6_cp_df <- data.frame(
  x = 1:4,
  y = 1:4,
  Group = factor(all_groups, levels = all_groups)
)

# Dummy legend plot
legend_Il6_cp_plot <- ggplot(legend_Il6_cp_df, aes(x = x, y = y, color = Group)) +
  geom_point(size = 4) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Group",
    values = stoodis_colors,
    breaks = all_groups,
    labels = c(
      "BBS/HC",
      "BBS/IS",
      expression(italic("M. aurum") * "/HC"),
      expression(italic("M. aurum") * "/IS")
    ),
    drop = FALSE
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    legend.title = element_text(size = 20),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 18),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

shared_Il6_cp_legend <- cowplot::get_legend(legend_Il6_cp_plot)

# Combine panels + legend
Il6_JSE_cp_plots <- ggarrange(
  Il6_cp_panel_plots,
  shared_Il6_cp_legend,
  ncol = 2,
  widths = c(1, 0.22)
)

# Save JPEG
ggsave(
  filename = "Maurum_data/R_figures/maurum_Il6_JSE_cp_plots.jpeg",
  plot = Il6_JSE_cp_plots,
  device = "jpeg",
  dpi = 600,
  width = 20,
  height = 10
)

# Save SVG
ggsave(
  filename = "Maurum_Data/R_figures/maurum_Il6_JSE_cp_plots.svg",
  plot = Il6_JSE_cp_plots,
  device = svglite::svglite,
  units = "in",
  width = 20,
  height = 10
)
```
